title: biscutella valentina subsp. stenophylla
intro: Biscutella valentina subsp. stenophylla is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the corn-marigold or biscutella. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biscutella valentina subsp. stenophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
